author: Ramesh Sharma
text: Ajay sir has been our family's insurance advisor for 12 years. He is always available on the phone and explains every plan in simple language. When my father passed away, the claim process was handled entirely by him. We didn't have to do anything.

author: Sunita Agarwal
text: I wanted to take a policy for my two children's education but was confused about which plan to choose. Ajay sir spent almost an hour with me, explaining the options without any pressure. I am very satisfied with the plan I took.

author: Pradeep Mishra
text: MDRT agent with genuine advice. He told me honestly that I didn't need a certain expensive ULIP and suggested a simpler, better plan. That kind of honesty is rare. I've referred five of my colleagues to him.

author: Kavita Singh
text: My husband's LIC maturity claim came through within 3 weeks of submission. Ajay sir guided us through every document and even visited the LIC office with us. Outstanding service.

author: Ankit Tiwari
text: I'm a government employee and Ajay sir helped me plan my entire retirement corpus using LIC pension and PPF together. He ran the numbers and showed me exactly what I'd receive monthly after 60. Very professional.

author: Meera Pandey
text: Been with Ajay sir since 2008. He reminds us before every premium due date. When we had a hospitalisation last year, the health insurance claim was settled in 10 days. Highly recommended for families in Gorakhpur.

author: Rakesh Dubey
text: Ajay sir explained the difference between term and endowment policies in a way that finally made sense to me. I used to think expensive meant better. Now I have a Rs 1 crore term plan and my family is fully protected.

author: Nisha Gupta
text: I was skeptical about online insurance advisors but Poddar Wealth's website had so much useful information that I called the number. Ajay sir answered personally and met us the same week. Took a family floater health plan. Very happy.
